Index.meta_title: Wasl - Managed restaurant and café operations for MENA
Index.meta_description: Wasl is a managed MENA restaurant and café operations platform for QR ordering, multilingual menus, local currency support, and staff order dashboards.

Landing.hero_eyebrow: Managed Wasl onboarding for MENA hospitality venues
Landing.hero_title: QR ordering and menu management for MENA hospitality.
Landing.hero_description: A complete QR ordering and menu management solution for MENA hospitality. Wasl supports validated restaurants, cafés, lounges, and food service businesses with multilingual menus, local pricing, and a staff dashboard for clearer service flow.
Landing.hero_signal_qr: QR ordering for tables, counters, and menus
Landing.hero_signal_currency: Local prices with optional USD display
Landing.brand_mark_description: A simple Wasl route-and-menu mark for QR ordering, service flow, and restaurant operations.
Landing.customer_illustration_title: A lightweight ordering experience from scan to service
Landing.features_title: A managed operating layer for modern restaurants and cafés
Landing.features_description: QR ordering, multilingual menu publishing, table flows, local currency support, and staff-friendly dashboards for MENA service teams.
Landing.feature_qr_menu_description: Wasl configures QR menu flows so guests can open the right menu from their phone.
Landing.feature_table_ordering_description: Customers can submit table orders with simple details that help staff identify and serve them.
Landing.feature_faster_service_description: Staff can scan newest orders first and move them from pending to preparing, ready, and delivered.
Landing.feature_usd_lbp_description: Show a restaurant’s configured local currency, USD, or both. No exchange-rate conversion and no approximate pricing.
Landing.feature_arabic_english_description: Arabic is supported with RTL layout, while English remains the default and French stays available.
Landing.feature_dashboard_description: Restaurant staff can manage incoming orders, statuses, menu items, tables, and QR codes from one lightweight dashboard.
Landing.how_setup_menu_description: Wasl discusses the restaurant or café setup, menu structure, currencies, and service model before access is granted.
Landing.how_print_qr_description: Wasl helps validated clients create tables and download the right QR codes for service.
Landing.how_customer_orders_description: The guest scans, adds items to cart, enters a first name, and submits.
Landing.how_staff_manages_description: Staff use the dashboard to review orders and update statuses during service.
Landing.mena_description: Restaurants across the region need software that respects language, service styles, cash-first habits, and unstable connections.
Landing.mena_unstable_internet_description: The public menu stays lightweight and avoids unnecessary client-side complexity.
Landing.mena_bilingual_service_description: Guests can switch between English, Arabic, and French without changing the flow.
Landing.mena_cash_reality_description: Orders can stay aligned with existing cash or manual payment habits without forcing online payment processing.
Landing.templates_title: Restaurant templates for different service styles
Landing.templates_description: Wasl can prepare a visual and operational profile that fits the restaurant or café before QR codes go live.
Landing.template_fast_food_description: Compact, high-contrast menus for quick ordering and counter-friendly service.
Landing.template_cafe_description: Softer spacing and menu cards for drinks, pastries, and casual tables.
Landing.template_table_service_description: Balanced layouts for dine-in restaurants that manage orders by table.
Landing.template_shisha_lounge_description: Dark, relaxed styling for longer sessions and table-based service.
Landing.pricing_description: Wasl access is granted only to validated restaurant and café clients. Onboarding is handled manually by the Wasl team after a discussion of your service model, menu, QR needs, and operating workflow.
Landing.pricing_plan_note: Interested restaurants and cafés should contact hello@waslmena.com to request an onboarding discussion.
Landing.faq_payments_question: Does Wasl replace a restaurant POS or payment system?
Landing.faq_payments_answer: Wasl currently focuses on QR ordering, multilingual menus, order management, and restaurant onboarding. POS/payment integrations are not active by default yet; they are part of the product roadmap and can be discussed for specific clients.
Landing.faq_languages_answer: Yes. Arabic is supported with RTL layout, and English and French are available from the same public menu flow.
Landing.faq_setup_question: Can anyone create a Wasl restaurant account?
Landing.faq_setup_answer: No. Wasl access is manually granted after the restaurant or café is validated by the Wasl team.
Landing.faq_templates_question: Can different restaurant types use different layouts?
Landing.faq_templates_answer: Yes. The admin can assign templates such as fast food, cafe, table service, and shisha lounge.
Landing.cta_title: Want to discuss Wasl for your hospitality venue?
Landing.cta_description: Tell us about your setup, service model, menu, and QR needs. The Wasl team will review the fit and next onboarding steps.
Landing.contact_description: New hospitality venues should contact hello@waslmena.com. Existing clients can use support@waslmena.com for technical support.
Landing.contact_hello_help: Use this for onboarding discussions and restaurant/café enquiries.
Landing.contact_support_help: Use this for existing client support and technical issues.
Landing.contact_form_description: Share a few details about your venue and Wasl will prepare the request for hello@waslmena.com.
Landing.contact_form_success: Your contact request has been prepared for Wasl. We will review it and follow up.
Landing.contact_form_invalid: Please enter your restaurant/café name, contact name, valid email, and message.
Landing.contact_form_error: There was a problem sending your message. Please try again later or email hello@waslmena.com.
Landing.contact_message_placeholder: Tell us about your venue, locations, service style, and QR ordering needs.
Landing.footer_text: Managed QR ordering and restaurant/café operations for MENA.

Hero.title: Managed QR ordering and restaurant operations for MENA.
Hero.description: Wasl supports validated restaurants and cafés with QR menus, local currency pricing, and staff order workflows.

Features.section_title: Managed tools for restaurant and café operations
Features.section_description: Menus, table QR codes, order status tracking, templates, local currency support, and guided onboarding.
Features.feature_description: Focused restaurant operations functionality with managed onboarding and support.

Pricing.section_title: Access for validated restaurant and café clients
Pricing.section_description: Wasl discusses setup, support, and operating needs manually before granting access.

FAQ.question: Does Wasl replace my POS or payment system?
FAQ.answer: No. Wasl focuses on QR ordering, multilingual menus, local currency support, and staff order management.

CTA.title: Discuss Wasl for your restaurant or café
CTA.description: Contact Wasl to review your setup, service style, QR ordering needs, and onboarding fit.

ProtectFallback.not_enough_permission: You do not have the permissions to perform this action

NetworkStatus.offline_banner: You are offline. Some actions may not work until the connection is back.

PublicMenu.meta_description: View the restaurant menu for your table.
PublicMenu.title: Menu
PublicMenu.description: Browse available items for this table.
PublicMenu.customer_name_error: Enter your first name before sending the order.
PublicMenu.order_success_helper: Keep this number visible for restaurant staff.
PublicMenu.order_error: We could not send the order. Please check the connection and try again.
PublicMenu.whatsapp_prefilled_message: Hello, I have a question about my order.
PublicMenu.restaurant_unavailable_description: This restaurant menu is currently unavailable. Please contact the restaurant staff.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

DashboardLayout.restaurant_dashboard_helper: Manage orders, menu, QR & Tables, statistics, and settings.

Statistics.title_bar_description: A quick operational snapshot for this restaurant.
Statistics.overview_section_description: Simple order counts and stored totals for the current organization.
Statistics.history_section_description: Review recent orders without loading external analytics.
Statistics.empty_history: No service orders in this period.
Statistics.finance_section_description: Optional monthly management view using existing orders and your manual costs.
Statistics.finance_revenue_help: Uses stored order totals only. USD and local currency stay separate.
Statistics.finance_margin_help: Revenue minus the manual monthly costs entered below, without currency conversion.
Statistics.finance_disclaimer: Indicative management tool only. This is not accounting software and does not handle invoices, taxes, POS reconciliation, or official reporting.
Statistics.finance_costs_form_description: Enter costs in the currency you actually use. Leave unused currencies blank.

Dashboard.meta_description: Manage orders, menu, QR & Tables, statistics, and settings.

DashboardIndex.title_bar_description: Manage orders, menu, QR & Tables, statistics, and settings.
DashboardIndex.welcome_description: Start with incoming orders, then jump to menu edits, QR & Tables, statistics, branding, or support.
DashboardIndex.summary_description: A quick snapshot for the selected restaurant organization.
DashboardIndex.quick_actions_description: Jump into the main restaurant workflows.
DashboardIndex.orders_description: View incoming orders, update statuses, print tickets, and keep service moving.
DashboardIndex.menu_description: Create and update menu items, availability, prices, and categories.
DashboardIndex.menu_categories_description: Organize the sections guests see on the public menu.
DashboardIndex.tables_description: Manage table numbers and download QR codes for guest ordering.
DashboardIndex.statistics_description: Review recent order counts, totals, and basic order history.
DashboardIndex.settings_description: Adjust branding, currency labels, and restaurant-facing settings.
DashboardIndex.support_description: Find help and share questions from the restaurant dashboard.

UserProfile.title_bar_description: View and manage your user profile

MenuCategories.meta_description: Manage menu categories for your restaurant.
MenuCategories.title_bar_description: Organize the sections guests see on your menu.
MenuCategories.create_section_description: Add a main category, or choose a parent to create a subcategory.
MenuCategories.language_help: Fill at least one language. Guests see their selected language when available.
MenuCategories.error_missing_name: Enter a category name in at least one language.
MenuCategories.error_category_in_use: This category can’t be deleted while it has subcategories or items assigned.
MenuCategories.delete_confirm: Delete this category? Menu items in it may become harder to manage.
MenuCategories.empty_state: No categories yet. Start with simple sections like Starters, Mains, Drinks, or Desserts.

MenuItems.meta_description: Manage menu items for your restaurant.
MenuItems.title_bar_description: Manage the dishes and drinks guests can order.
MenuItems.advanced_appearance_description: Control public menu style and item photo visibility.
MenuItems.show_menu_item_images_label: Show item photos on public menu
MenuItems.show_menu_item_images_help: Photos remain stored and can be shown again later.
MenuItems.create_section_description: Add categories, subcategories, and menu items from one place.
MenuItems.create_category_help: Create a main section of the menu.
MenuItems.create_subcategory_help: Create a rubric inside an existing category.
MenuItems.create_item_help: Add a dish, drink, or product to the menu.
MenuItems.category_language_help: Fill at least one category name.
MenuItems.language_help: Fill at least one item name. Descriptions are optional in each language.
MenuItems.image_url_help: Optional. Upload a lightweight image file, ideally compressed and small for mobile connections.
MenuItems.image_preview_helper: Preview only. Broken image links are hidden on the public menu.
MenuItems.price_lbp_help: Enter the full local currency amount, for example 42.
MenuItems.price_local_help: Enter the full {currency} amount, for example 42.
MenuItems.price_requirement: Enter a {currency} price, a USD price, or both. USD is optional.
MenuItems.error_missing_price: Enter at least one price: USD or {currency}.
MenuItems.error_invalid_image_type: Upload must be JPG, PNG, or WEBP.
MenuItems.error_image_too_large: Uploaded image must be 300 KB or smaller.
MenuItems.error_category_in_use: This category can’t be deleted while it has subcategories or items assigned.
MenuItems.error_currency_mismatch: Keep one currency rule for the whole menu. If USD is used, every item needs USD. If {currency} is used, every item needs {currency}. If both are used, every item needs both.
MenuItems.is_available_help: Unavailable items remain visible but cannot be ordered.
MenuItems.list_section_description: Current menu items for this organization.
MenuItems.category_list_section_description: Current categories and subcategories for this organization.
MenuItems.delete_confirm: Delete this menu item? Existing orders keep their saved price snapshot.
MenuItems.delete_category_confirm: Delete this category? Menu items in it may become harder to manage.
MenuItems.empty_categories_state: No categories yet. Start with simple sections like Starters, Mains, Drinks, or Desserts.
MenuItems.empty_state: No menu items yet. Add your first dish or drink so guests can start ordering.
MenuItems.no_categories_state: Create a category first, then add dishes and drinks to it.
MenuItems.no_parent_categories_state: Create a category before adding subcategories.

RestaurantTables.meta_description: Manage restaurant tables for QR ordering.
RestaurantTables.title_bar_description: Create table numbers for future QR code ordering.
RestaurantTables.create_section_description: Add a physical table for this organization.
RestaurantTables.qr_code_title: Public menu QR code for table {tableNumber}
RestaurantTables.general_qr_section_description: Use this QR for menu browsing without creating a table.
RestaurantTables.delete_confirm: Delete this table? Existing orders will stay saved.
RestaurantTables.delete_blocked_message: This table has existing orders and cannot be deleted.
RestaurantTables.general_menu_no_tables: General menu mode is active. No table QR codes are required.
RestaurantTables.empty_state: No tables yet. Create the restaurant tables you want customers to scan from.
RestaurantTables.advanced_section_description: Adjust ordering flow, QR appearance, table options, and public menu style.
RestaurantTables.enable_customer_name_help: Ask guests for a name on orders.
RestaurantTables.enable_whatsapp_contact_help: Show the contact action on public menus.
RestaurantTables.show_menu_item_images_label: Show item photos on public menu
RestaurantTables.show_menu_item_images_help: Photos remain stored and can be shown again later.

RestaurantBranding.meta_description: Configure public menu branding for your restaurant.
RestaurantBranding.title_bar_description: Customize how your public QR menu appears to guests.
RestaurantBranding.section_description: All fields are optional. Leave them empty to use the default public menu style.
RestaurantBranding.address_help: Optional. Shown on printed and copied order tickets.
RestaurantBranding.primary_color_help: Used for main customer buttons on the public menu.
RestaurantBranding.accent_color_help: Used for borders and secondary highlights.
RestaurantBranding.theme_mode_help: Day keeps a light presentation, night uses a darker one, and auto follows the device preference when available.
RestaurantBranding.template_style_help: Choose a lightweight visual style for the public QR menu.
RestaurantBranding.whatsapp_number_help: Optional. Customers can use it to contact the restaurant about questions, not automated ordering.
RestaurantBranding.whatsapp_enabled_help: Show or hide the WhatsApp contact button on the public menu.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_screen_description: Optionally show a fast branded screen before guests open the menu.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_enabled_help: Only appears when an optimized welcome image is uploaded. Without an image, QR codes open the menu directly.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_image_help: Upload a background image only. Do not include buttons, text, labels, or menu instructions inside the image. Recommended: 1080x1920 vertical JPG or WEBP.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_image_upload_note: Recommended max size: ~1.5 MB. Images are automatically resized, compressed, and saved as WEBP and AVIF for mobile performance.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_preview_help: This image is independent from menu item photos and still displays when menu photos are disabled.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_remove_label: Remove welcome image and skip the splash screen
RestaurantBranding.welcome_button_position_help: Horizontal position stays centered. Lower center is the mobile-first default.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_button_color_help: Auto-filled from the uploaded image when possible. You can manually override it anytime.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_generated_color_empty: Upload an image to generate a color.
RestaurantBranding.welcome_use_accent_label: Use welcome screen color for public menu
RestaurantBranding.welcome_use_accent_help: Use the color detected from the welcome image as the menu accent color. You can still adjust it manually later.
RestaurantBranding.order_notifications_description: Control how this restaurant notices new pending orders after refreshing the orders page.
RestaurantBranding.visual_notifications_help: Show an in-page banner, highlight new pending orders, and use browser notifications when allowed.
RestaurantBranding.sound_notifications_help: Play a short sound for new pending orders after refresh. Some browsers require a prior tap or click.
RestaurantBranding.local_currency_help: Optional. Existing local prices are preserved. Use AED, SAR, QAR, KWD, EGP, MAD, or LBP + LL for Lebanon. USD prices remain optional per menu item. No conversion is performed.
RestaurantBranding.error_invalid_welcome_image: Upload a JPG or WEBP welcome image under 5 MB.
RestaurantBranding.error_invalid_branding: Use a valid logo URL, color, and currency settings.

Orders.meta_description: View and manage incoming restaurant orders.
Orders.title_bar_description: Track incoming table orders during service.
Orders.refresh_helper: New orders do not appear automatically yet. Refresh this page during service to check for new orders.
Orders.custom_range_invalid: Custom ranges are limited to 31 days. Choose a shorter range to view orders.
Orders.orders_limit_helper: Last 48 hours is the default so late-night service stays visible after midnight. Use filters for older orders.
Orders.export_limit_helper: For performance reasons, exports are limited to 90 days at a time. Large exports are limited for performance and connection stability.
Orders.elapsed_minutes: {count, plural, =1 {# min ago} other {# min ago}}
Orders.elapsed_hours: {count, plural, =1 {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
Orders.edit_remove_help: Set quantity to 0 to remove an item.
Orders.empty_status_section: No active orders here right now.
Orders.pending_notification_visual_helper: Visual alerts use the current restaurant settings and appear after refreshing orders.
Orders.pending_notification_sound_helper: Sound is enabled. Browser and mobile audio may require a prior tap or click on this page.
Orders.pending_notification_banner: {count, plural, =1 {New pending order detected.} other {# new pending orders detected.}}
Orders.pending_notification_browser_body: {count, plural, =1 {1 new pending order arrived.} other {# new pending orders arrived.}}
Orders.pending_notification_blocked: Browser notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
Orders.edit_locked_message: Completed and cancelled orders cannot be edited. Reopen the order first if changes are needed.
Orders.empty_state: No active orders right now. Keep this screen open during service and refresh when guests order.

PilotChecklist.meta_description: Prepare and run a controlled restaurant pilot.
PilotChecklist.title_bar_description: A lightweight runbook for testing the MVP with a real restaurant.
PilotChecklist.before_service_description: Prepare the menu, tables, and first phone test.
PilotChecklist.during_service_description: Keep the flow observable and capture friction quickly.
PilotChecklist.after_service_description: Review what happened while details are still fresh.
PilotChecklist.item_create_menu_items: Create menu items with the right local and optional USD prices.
PilotChecklist.item_download_print_qr_codes: Download and print QR codes for the test tables.
PilotChecklist.item_test_one_phone_order: Test one full order from a phone before guests arrive.
PilotChecklist.item_keep_orders_dashboard_open: Keep the orders dashboard open on a staff device.
PilotChecklist.item_refresh_orders: Refresh orders during service to catch new orders.
PilotChecklist.item_watch_pending_orders: Watch pending orders and move them through preparing, ready, and delivered.
PilotChecklist.item_record_staff_feedback: Record staff feedback during quiet moments.
PilotChecklist.item_record_customer_confusion: Record customer confusion points or repeated questions.
PilotChecklist.item_collect_staff_notes: Collect staff notes about speed, clarity, and missing menu details.
PilotChecklist.item_collect_customer_notes: Collect customer notes about ordering and payment expectations.
PilotChecklist.item_list_blockers_before_next_test: List blockers to fix before the next pilot session.

PilotFeedback.meta_description: Collect customer and staff feedback during a restaurant pilot.
PilotFeedback.title_bar_description: A simple guide for collecting useful notes during the restaurant test.
PilotFeedback.customer_script_description: Ask a test customer to walk through the real QR ordering flow.
PilotFeedback.customer_scan_qr_code: Scan the QR code from the table.
PilotFeedback.customer_open_menu: Open the menu page and look through the available items.
PilotFeedback.customer_add_item_to_cart: Add at least one item to the cart.
PilotFeedback.customer_enter_first_name: Enter a first name for the order.
PilotFeedback.customer_submit_order: Submit the order and wait for the confirmation message.
PilotFeedback.customer_report_confusion: Report anything confusing, slow, unclear, or unexpected.
PilotFeedback.staff_grid_description: Use these prompts after or during quiet moments in service.
PilotFeedback.staff_reading_orders_description: Were orders easy to scan quickly on the dashboard?
PilotFeedback.staff_speed_of_service_description: Did the flow slow down or speed up the staff during service?
PilotFeedback.staff_status_clarity_description: Were pending, preparing, ready, delivered, and cancelled clear enough?
PilotFeedback.staff_missing_information_description: What information was missing from orders, items, tables, or customer details?
PilotFeedback.staff_pricing_clarity_description: Were local currency and optional USD prices clear for staff and customers?
PilotFeedback.staff_connection_issues_description: Did weak internet affect menu loading, submitting, or refreshing orders?
PilotFeedback.staff_qr_scanning_issues_description: Were QR codes easy to scan from the printed position and lighting?
PilotFeedback.staff_suggested_improvements_description: What small change would make the next test easier or safer?

Support.meta_description: Get lightweight support for the restaurant ordering dashboard.
Support.title_bar_description: Quick help for restaurant users during setup and service.
Support.contact_description: Use the official Wasl support contacts configured by the founder admin.
Support.form_description: Send a short message to Wasl support. We'll reply to the email you provide.
Support.form_success: Message sent — support will reply shortly.
Support.form_error: There was a problem sending your support message. Please try again later.
Support.form_invalid: Please provide a subject and message before sending.
Support.whatsapp_unavailable: WhatsApp support is not configured yet.
Support.faq_description: Common questions for the MVP pilot.
Support.faq_pilot_setup_question: What should I set up before service?
Support.faq_pilot_setup_answer: Create categories, menu items, tables, and QR codes. Then test one full order from a phone before customers arrive.
Support.faq_qr_codes_question: Where do I get QR codes?
Support.faq_qr_codes_answer: Open Tables in the dashboard. Each table has a QR preview and download button for its public menu link.
Support.faq_menu_prices_question: Can I use local currency and USD prices?
Support.faq_menu_prices_answer: Yes. Menu items can have local currency, USD, or both. The app does not convert between currencies.
Support.troubleshooting_qr_not_opening_descripti: Check that the printed QR is clear, the phone camera can focus, and the table still exists in the dashboard.
Support.troubleshooting_orders_not_appearing_des: Confirm the customer saw the success message, then refresh the Orders page and check the internet connection.
Support.troubleshooting_refresh_orders_descripti: Open Orders and use the Refresh orders button during service. Realtime updates are not enabled yet.
Support.troubleshooting_update_prices_descriptio: Open Menu items, expand Edit on the item, update the local amount and/or optional USD cents, then save.

Billing.current_section_description: Adjust your payment plan to best suit your requirements

CheckoutConfirmation.message_state_description: Your payment has been successfully processed. Thank you for your purchase!

Todos.title_bar_description: View and manage your todo list

AddTodo.add_todo_section_description: Fill in the form below to create a new todo

EditTodo.edit_todo_section_description: Fill in the form below to edit the todo

TodoForm.title_description: Enter a descriptive title for your todo.
TodoForm.message_description: Enter a detailed message for your todo.
